modmenu.descriptionTranslation.boathud: This mod adds a racing style HUD, configurable, for riding a boat, and is designed mostly for racing boats on ice.
boathud.config.title: BoatHud Options
boathud.tooltip.minimap_lock_north: When enabled, the minimap always shows north. When disabled, it rotates with player view.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_player_shape: Choose the shape of the player indicator on the minimap.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_ice_detection_ra: The number of blocks above and below the player to check for ice.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_flat_ice: When enabled, all ice blocks are displayed with the same brightness, ignoring height differences.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_show_all_heights: When enabled, shows ice blocks at all heights. When disabled, shows only ice at or below player level.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_show_other_playe: When enabled, displays other players in boats as blue triangles on the minimap.
boathud.tooltip.minimap_size: Adjust the resolution of the minimap. Higher values provide more detail but use more resources.
boathud.tooltip.extended: Enables acceleration meter and input display
boathud.tooltip.bar_type: Change the display and behavior of the speed bar:
boathud.tooltip.bar_type.packed: Water & Packed: Best for low speeds.
boathud.tooltip.bar_type.mixed: Mixed: Best for running on any kind of ice.
boathud.tooltip.bar_type.blue: Blue: Suitable mostly for blue ice racing.
